news.headline: Philippines construction industry to grow by 8.4% in 2024, reaching PHP 1.94 trillion - report by ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: Dublin - An updated report titled "Philippines Construction Industry Databook Series" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, forecasting a significant growth in the country's construction sector. The industry in the Philippines is projected to increase by 8.4% and reach PHP 1.94 trillion by 2024. This report provides insights into market trends, opportunities, and forecasts for both the value and volume (area and units) of construction activities in the building and infrastructure sectors. Overlooking the country level, this market intelligence report presents a comprehensive analysis for stakeholders.

news.headline: Top 20 cities for STEM job growth announced in RCLCO's 2024 STEMdex including Austin, Seattle, Denver, San Francisco, Raleigh.
news.summary: The cities of Austin, Seattle, Denver, San Francisco, and Raleigh have been identified as the top performers in terms of momentum for STEM job growth in a recent report released by RCLCO Real Estate Consulting based in Bethesda, Md. According to the firm's 2024 analysis, these cities are experiencing significant expansion in STEM employment opportunities. This highlights a trend towards increasing focus on STEM industries within these regions and underscores their appeal as hubs for the technology and innovation sectors.

news.headline: SmartRent wins 2024 MHN Excellence Silver Award for Best Technology in the “Best Technology” category.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, SmartRent is excited to reveal it has been named a winner of the 2024 Multi-Housing News Excellence Award for "Best Technology." The prestigious award recognizes outstanding achievements in the housing industry. SmartRent's innovative technology solutions have been acknowledged for their excellence, showcasing the company's commitment to advancing the sector.

news.headline: Global PCB cleaning machines market valued at USD 1.4 billion in 2023, expected to reach USD 2.6 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 5.8%, driven by demand for high-precision cleaning in electronics industry and advancements in cleaning technologies.
news.summary: The global PCB cleaning machines market was valued at USD 1.4 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach USD 2.6 billion by the end of 2034, growing at a CAGR of 5.8% during the period. This growth is fueled by the increasing demand for precise cleaning in the electronics industry and advancements in cleaning technologies. PCBs are vital components in electronics, requiring thorough cleaning to remove contaminants and ensure product reliability. PCB cleaning machines are essential for this process, removing impurities and residues to maintain functionality. Market growth is attributed to the demand for miniaturized electronics, increasing consumer electronics production, growth in the automotive industry, and technological advancements in PCB manufacturing. Key players in the industry are driving innovation to meet market demands.

news.headline: FORM launched GoSpotCheck on Salesforce AppExchange, letting customers capture, analyze, and act on product data in the field.
news.summary: Today, FORM has introduced GoSpotCheck on Salesforce AppExchange, allowing their customers to access tools for gathering, examining, and responding to product-specific information while in the field. This development, announced in Quincy, Massachusetts on December 12, 2024, provides FORM's customers with enhanced capabilities to work with product-level data. This integration with Salesforce AppExchange, a prominent marketplace for partner apps in the enterprise sector, is set to empower FORM's users with valuable insights for their operations.

news.headline: Ramp integrates with Intuit QuickBooks Desktop, with streaming accounting feature benefiting shared customers.
news.summary: Ramp, a finance operations platform based in New York, revealed a new integration with Intuit QuickBooks Desktop on December 12, 2024. This collaboration aims to enhance accounting processes for their shared customers by streamlining capabilities. The integration is expected to bring about greater efficiency for businesses, saving them both time and money.

news.headline: Richardson International Limited to double granola packaging capabilities at South Sioux City facility in Nebraska.
news.summary: Richardson International Limited has revealed an expansion project at its oat mill and processing facility in South Sioux City, Nebraska. The investment, announced on December 12, 2024, is set to double the site's granola packaging capacity. This move signifies a major development for the company, showcasing its commitment to growth and innovation.

news.headline: GNW Consulting sees revenue growth, expands team & partnerships in 2024. Key hires & AI use drive efficiency gains.
news.summary: Ending a year characterized by significant additions to the team, collaborations with key partners, adoption of strategic AI technologies, and notable efficiency improvements, GNW Consulting based in Gilbert, Arizona reported these accomplishments on December 12, 2024. This agency focuses on supporting businesses in executing, merging, and enhancing their marketing strategies.

news.headline: EF Education First ranks 304th among 850 global companies in Forbes 2024 survey for World's Best Employers and Top Companies for Women.
news.summary: In Zurich on December 12, 2024, EF Education First (EF), a renowned global provider of culturally immersive education, achieved recognition by being listed on the Forbes 2024 World's Best Employers and Top Companies for Women. In a notable accomplishment, EF secured the 304th position out of 850 global companies participating in the annual survey. This recognition reflects EF's commitment to providing an excellent workplace environment and its dedication to promoting gender equality.

news.headline: New product "Carry the Round Kit" combines coffee and gun storage to reduce Veteran suicide; collaboration between WAV, Aerial Resupply Coffee & StopBox USA.
news.summary: In a recent press release on Dec. 12, 2024, Worried About a Veteran (WAV) revealed a pioneering collaboration to tackle Veteran gun suicide rates. Teaming up with Aerial Resupply Coffee and StopBox USA, WAV introduced the innovative "Carry the Round" kit. This unique product is designed to address this critical issue by offering a limited-edition coffee package that includes - characters which helps in promoting awareness and providing essential support in reducing Veteran gun suicides.

news.headline: Talent acquisition leaders face data gaps but are optimistic about AI, per Symphony Talent's 2025 report.
news.summary: Symphony Talent's 2025 Talent Acquisition Outlook Report was recently released in New York on December 12, 2024. The report, which is an annual publication from the global talent acquisition solutions leader, provides insights into critical challenges and opportunities facing the industry. The findings are based on a survey conducted by Symphony Talent, indicating key trends and statistics that will shape the future of talent acquisition. This comprehensive report is a valuable resource for organizations looking to stay informed and competitive in the rapidly changing landscape of hiring and recruitment.

news.headline: InventHelp inventors from Troy, N.Y developed the M V F Leash with mace dispenser for pet safety.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 12, 2024, two inventors from Troy, New York created the M V F LEASH to provide a means of easily accessing and using mace or bear deterrent while walking or hiking with a dog. The innovative design aims to safeguard against aggressive individuals during outdoor activities. The inventors recognized the necessity for enhanced safety measures, and their invention offers a practical solution for pet owners, with the potential to make outdoor excursions safer and more secure for both dogs and their owners.

news.headline: United Playaz's gun buyback event on Dec. 14 aims to remove 500 firearms from SF streets by offering $100 for handguns and $200 for assault rifles.
news.summary: An upcoming event is focused on reducing the number of firearms in circulation and preventing gun violence within the city. It offers $100 for handguns and $200 for assault rifles with no inquiries made. The San Francisco Police Department, local gun violence prevention organizations, and a prominent cannabis brand are key partners in this initiative.

news.headline: Deerpath Capital resets its largest CLO, 2022-1, at $724.7M, the firm's biggest in history.
news.summary: In New York on December 12, 2024, Deerpath Capital Management, LP disclosed the reset and increase of Deerpath CLO 2022-1, a collateralized loan obligation valued at $724.7 million. Deerpath is recognized as one of the leading private credit managers in the lower-middle market sector in the United States.

news.headline: Alteryx names Nali Giliana as Chief of Staff and Strategy. Key numbers: Dec. 12, 2024, enterprise analytics AI platform.
news.summary: Alteryx, Inc., an AI platform catering to enterprise analytics based in Irvine, California, made a significant announcement on Dec. 12, 2024, welcoming Nali Giliana as their new Chief of Staff and Strategy. Renowned as an expert in the Enterprise SaaS industry, Giliana joins the company to lead essential operations and shape strategic initiatives. With a track record of over two years in the industry, Giliana's expertise is expected to propel Alteryx, Inc. to new heights.

news.headline: Colclasure Enterprises getting $12M from NMTC to build plant in Selma, Alabama, creating 50 jobs.
news.summary: In Selma, Alabama, on December 12, 2024, UB Community Development, LLC (UBCD) announced a $12 million New Markets Tax Credit (NMTC) allocation in collaboration with United Bank. This funding will be used to transform a closed building into a manufacturing and distribution facility.

news.headline: BKM Capital Partners secures $550 million recapitalization deal with Kayne Anderson Real Estate for light industrial portfolio.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, BKM Capital Partners, an institutional fund manager focusing on value-add light industrial properties, completed a $550 million recapitalization deal. The firm, headquartered in Newport Beach, Calif., and Boca Raton, Fla., specializes in managing industrial assets.

news.headline: Array Behavioral Health reaches milestone, marking 25 years of innovation in virtual psychiatry and therapy, focusing on integrated care and mental health improvement.
news.summary: Array Behavioral Care, a top virtual psychiatry and therapy provider in the United States, is celebrating its 25th anniversary by looking back on years of innovation. The company, based in Mount Laurel, New Jersey, has focused on advancing integrated care to enhance mental health outcomes. This milestone showcases Array Behavioral Care's dedication to improving mental health through virtual services.

news.headline: Get 50% off on MocPOGO for spoofing in Pokémon GO, with discounts up to 85% for holiday events.
news.summary: In New York on December 12, 2024, Pokémon GO Trainers have exciting news for the holiday season! MocPOGO's incredible GPS location-changing tool is offering fantastic discounts, with exclusive deals of up to 85% off to maximize the enjoyment of in-game events.

news.headline: Emotion AI Market to reach $9.01 billion by 2030 from $2.74 billion in 2024, growing at CAGR of 21.9% - MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: A recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ predicts that the Emotion AI Market, currently valued at USD 2.74 billion in 2024, is forecasted to grow to USD 9.01 billion by the year 2030. This growth reflects a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 21.9% during the period from 2024 to 2030. The report offers an extensive look into the "Emotion AI Market", with a detailed table of contents spanning 387 pages.

news.headline: Photronics, Inc. will participate in the 13th Annual NYC Summit investor conference on Dec. 17, 2024 at Mastro’s Steakhouse. Contact lauraoiye@gmail.com for more info.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Photronics, Inc. (Nasdaq:PLAB), a global leader in photomask technologies, revealed its involvement in the 13th Annual NYC Summit investor conference scheduled for December 17, 2024, at Mastro’s Steakhouse in New York City. The event will feature small group investor meetings conducted by the company’s management. Attendance at the NYC Summit is exclusive to accredited investors and publishing research analysts through invitation only. For additional details, interested parties can reach out to Co-Chair Laura Guerrant-Oiye at lauraoiye@gmail.com.

news.headline: EPSO-G held an Extraordinary General Meeting, legal entity code 302826889, address in Vilnius, Lithuania.
news.summary: The Energy Transmission and Exchange Group, known as EPSO-G, is a registered legal entity with the code 302826889 and their headquarters located at Laisvės pr. 10 in Vilnius, Lithuania. EPSO-G is involved in the transmission and exchange of energy.

news.headline: Formic adds new VP of Sales and General Counsel to drive growth after $27.4M in Series A funding.
news.summary: Chicago-based Formic, a Robots-as-a-Service (RaaS) automation provider catering to U.S. manufacturers, has appointed Joel Onyshuk as its Vice President of Sales and Todd Plotner as the company's inaugural General Counsel. This move comes in the wake of significant business expansion and a successful Series A funding round in June, securing $27.4 million. With this new infusion of capital, combined with the extensive industry expertise brought by Onyshuk and Plotner, Formic aims to drive the widespread implementation of automation within the American manufacturing sector.

James River Church offers discount for 2025 Stronger Men’s Conference in Springfield, featuring guest speakers and events.
news.summary: In Springfield, Missouri, the Stronger Men’s Conference organized by James River Church is an impactful yearly event designed to empower men of all ages to reach their full potential as intended by God. The conference includes diverse activities and renowned speakers, centering around the church’s fundamental principles of prayer, worship, expository preaching, and aiding individuals in their spiritual development with Jesus. The upcoming edition of this two-day conference will be held at the Great Southern Bank Arena with an expected attendance of (number) attendees.

news.headline:
New Political Trade Reported: T - Buy - joint - $1,000 - $15,000 -  - Virginia Foxx 
 transaction date: 2024-11-01 
 filed at date: 2024-12-11
Keros Therapeutics stock nosedives 73% after halting high dose due to side effects in hypertension study.
news.summary: Keros Therapeutics experienced a significant drop in stock value on Thursday following the decision to halt administration of higher doses in a study on lung disease due to adverse effects. The company's stock plunged by 73% due to unexpected side effects in a hypertension study, impacting investor confidence.

news.headline: GE Vernova gas turbines awarded top pick status for powering AI data centers, amid gold rush; key for Big Tech.
news.summary: GE Vernova's gas-powered turbines have been recognized as a top choice for Big Tech companies seeking to power their data center campuses. The turbines have been awarded the prestigious 'Top Pick' status for 2025, amid a surge in demand driven by the AI data center boom. This recognition underscores the growing importance of reliable and efficient energy solutions for companies operating in the data center industry.

news.headline: Uber stock rises after CFO's positive commentary, recovering from selloff. CFO Prashanth Mahendra-Rajah's remarks boosted investor confidence.
news.summary: The value of Uber's stock recovered after experiencing a decline on Wednesday as CFO Prashanth Mahendra-Rajah provided optimistic insights. The bounce-back in Uber stock followed the positive commentary on robotaxis and demand from the CFO. This development came after a selloff earlier in the week and was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Hut 8 building $12B AI data center, potential Meta partnership. Shares rally on speculation.
news.summary: Hut 8 has announced plans to construct a massive AI data center valued at $12 billion. There are rumors circulating that the bitcoin mining company may soon collaborate with Meta, leading to a surge in their shares. The news of Hut 8's ambitious project and potential partnership has generated excitement among investors and industry analysts.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls on hot inflation data, jobless claims rise; Tesla reverses lower, Nvidia slides.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones experienced a decline due to a significant inflation report and an unexpected increase in jobless claims. During this time, Tesla saw a reversal in its stocks, while Nvidia also underwent a sell-off. The market response reflects growing concerns about the economic impact of the current inflation rate and rising unemployment numbers. The Dow Jones's decrease and the respective company stock movements highlight the uncertainty and volatility surrounding the current financial climate.

news.headline: Roadzen (Nasdaq: RDZN) extends senior debt maturity to Dec 31, 2025 with Mizuho, $11.5 million 15% secured notes.
news.summary: In New York on December 12, 2024, Roadzen Inc. (Nasdaq: RDZN), a prominent player in AI within the insurance and mobility sectors, announced a preliminary agreement with Mizuho Securities USA LLC to prolong the maturity of its $11.5 million 15% senior secured notes by one year to December 31, 2025. This extension offers Roadzen financial leeway and is contingent upon finalizing definite agreements and meeting specified conditions.

news.headline: Global protein glue market to hit $4.53B by 2034, driven by eco-friendly adhesive demand in industries such as woodworking and packaging.
news.summary: The global protein glue market is expected to reach a valuation of US$2,411.5 million in 2024 and grow at a CAGR of 6.5% from 2024 to 2034. The increasing demand for bio-friendly and renewable protein adhesives is being driven by applications in woodworking, packaging, and bookbinding industries. Environmental concerns and regulations against synthetic adhesives have led to the adoption of protein-based alternatives offering benefits like biodegradability and strong bonding capabilities. The market is estimated to reach US$4,526.7 million by 2034, with North America holding a market share of 24.3%. Predominating market players include Henkel AG & Co. KGaA, Cattie Adhesives & Franklin International. Plant-based protein glues are expected to reach around US$1,039.4 million by 2024.

news.headline: BE OPEN launches Cultural Tapestry Open Call to celebrate diversity globally across social media platforms. Founded by Elena Baturina, the initiative invites participants to share their vision.
news.summary: A global open call is being launched by BE OPEN, a creative think-tank established by entrepreneur and philanthropist Elena Baturina, based in Lugano, Switzerland. The initiative, set to begin on December 12, 2024, will be conducted through social media platforms. In this call, individuals are invited to present their creative vision for a chance to participate in the project. This marks an opportunity for a wide audience to engage with the think-tank, expressing their ideas and aspirations. Through this open forum, BE OPEN aims to foster creativity and innovation by leveraging the diverse perspectives and talents of participants.

news.headline: Traders pare ECB easing bets, see less than 125bps in 2025.
Bank of Åland Plc plans to reduce prime rate by 0.25% due to economic trend shifts and market conditions.
US Steel employees rallying at Clairton Plant in support of Nippon Steel transaction.
news.summary: Workers at United States Steel Corporation (NYSE: X) are organizing a rally today at the U.S. Steel Mon Valley Works Clairton Plant to show their backing for the Nippon Steel transaction. Both represented and non-represented employees, as well as local community members and elected officials, will come together to demonstrate their endorsement for the deal. The rally aims to highlight the advantages of this transaction for employees and advocates will urge government officials nationwide to acknowledge its importance.

news.headline: PxE Holographic Imaging to unveil new 3D camera at CES 2025 in Rehovot, Israel.
news.summary: An upcoming event in REHOVOT, Israel will see the unveiling of an advanced 3D camera by PxE Holographic Imaging. The next-generation camera is set to make its debut at CES 2025, showcasing cutting-edge technology in the realm of 3D imaging. This development marks a significant step forward in camera innovation and is expected to generate buzz at the event. Attendees can look forward to experiencing the latest in holographic imaging technology, as PxE presents its state-of-the-art product to a global audience.

news.headline: Vandis, Inc achieved Fortinet's Cloud Security Partner Specialization in the Fortinet Engage Partner Program.
news.summary: In Albertson, New York on December 12, 2024, Vandis, Inc revealed its attainment of the Fortinet Cloud Security Partner Specialization within the Fortinet Engage Partner Program. This recognition is exclusively granted to partners meeting specific criteria, showcasing their expertise and commitment in cloud security solutions.

news.headline: Hidden River invests in Seedbox Solution to support growth in agricultural supply chain sector. (CHARACTERS: 94)
news.summary: Hidden River Strategic Capital ("Hidden River") has revealed their investment in Seedbox Solution, a company in the agricultural supply chain sector. The investment is a part of Hidden River's strategy to bolster innovation and expansion in the industry. This move was announced in Radnor, Pennsylvania on December 12, 2024. Seedbox Solution is a full-service provider benefiting from this investment, marking a pivotal moment for both companies.

news.headline: Banking experts predict 13 trends for 2025 including AI advancements in fraud, risk management, and customer experience.
news.summary: In Cary, North Carolina on December 12, 2024, experts from SAS predict that the acceleration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) will lead to significant advancements in various fields such as fraud detection, risk management, and customer experience. Despite ongoing economic challenges, regulatory changes, and rapid technological progress, experts believe that AI will play a crucial role in shaping the year 2025. This technological acceleration is expected to bring key developments and improvements in key areas, showcasing the potential impact of AI in addressing challenges and driving innovation.

news.headline: ECB forecast inflation easing to 2% in 4Q/2025.
ECB forecasts assume 2024 oil price of $81.8/barrel, 2025 $71.80, 2026 $70.10, and 2027 $69.20.
Trump: I have a good relationship with China. I have been talking and discussing things with Xi.
ECB forecasts assume exchange rate of $1.08 in 2024.
ECB forecasts assume exchange rate of $1.06 in 2025, 2026, 2027.
Trump: We will be doing something great with crypto.
Implementation of squeeze-out of MRM underway, aiming to acquire remaining 10% shares.
